\[mh ("anterior cruciate ligament"\] OR "anterior cruciate ligament":ti,ab OR "anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction":ti,ab OR "acl":ti,ab) AND ("tibialis":ti,ab OR "tibialis anterior":ti,ab OR "tibialis posterior":ti,ab) AND (("randomized controlled trial":pt OR "randomized controlled trial":ti,ab OR "randomised controlled trial":ti,ab) NOT ("review":pt OR "review":ti,ab OR "systematic review":pt OR "systematic review":ti,ab OR "meta-analysis":pt OR "meta-analysis":ti,ab)) AND ("ikdc":ti,ab OR "lysholm":ti,ab OR "tegner":ti,ab OR (("instrumental laxity":ti,ab OR "kt-1000":ti,ab OR "kt-2000":ti,ab OR "rolimeter":ti,ab) OR "pivot shift":ti,ab OR "lachman":ti,ab) OR ("graft failure":ti,ab OR "graft rupture":ti,ab))
